title: Blox AI POST /feedback request body
description: Phase 16 contract. The app submits this body via the BLE proxy (ai/feedback) when the user dismisses an AI session. Container appends one line to /var/log/fula/ai-feedback.jsonl per feedback_log_line.schema.json. Feedback is local-only — no central upload happens here. The Phase C opt-in transcript upload is a SEPARATE flow (POST direct from app to https://ai-training.fx.land/transcripts) and is gated by anonymization + per-session explicit consent.

session_id.description: From the session_started event of the corresponding /troubleshoot stream. Container looks up the session to pull verdict + actions taken; if the session has been evicted from the in-memory dict (TTL or LRU), container still accepts the feedback but writes verdict_summary='' and actions_taken=[] (don't lose the user's rating).

rating.description: 1 = thumbs up (helpful), -1 = thumbs down (not helpful), 0 = explicit skip. Required so 'modal dismissed by tap-outside' is distinguishable from a deliberate skip (the app sends 0 only when the user tapped Skip).

comment.description: Optional freeform text. Container MUST sanitize for log injection (escape/forbid CR/LF) before appending to the JSONL. NEVER auto-uploaded — only persists in /var/log/fula/ai-feedback.jsonl.
